channel.title: flove making-of — compute questions
channel.description: New compute design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Where does the puzzy compute live?
item.description:
• Client-only — All compute in the browser. Privacy-first, limited by device power. • Module-42-only — Server-side compute. Powerful, centralized, requires trust. • Hybrid with offline cache — Client-first, server fallback, offline cache. Balanced, complex. • Defer — Don't decide yet — wait until F5.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer
